title: Record Income
description: The system shall allow the user to create an income transaction linked to a mandatory Category and Account, with an amount, user-specified date/time, optional source, and optional note.
acceptance_criteria: Income transaction increases the linked account balance
Saving income without a Category or Account is rejected
The entry UI provides a date/time picker pre-filled with the current system time
User can modify the date and time to any past or future value
Income appears in the timeline at the selected date with a distinct visual indicator (positive direction)
